name: Dark Seal

passives.name: Glory
passives.effects: Gain 2 stacks for each champion [[kill]] and 1 stack for each [[assist]], up to a '''maximum''' of 10 stacks. For every stack, gain {{as|4 ability power}}, up to {{as|40|AP}} at '''maximum''' stacks. Lose 5 stacks on [[death]]. Stacks are preserved when upgrading to {{ii|Mejai's Soulstealer}}.

effects_structured.raw: Gain 2 stacks for each champion [[kill]] and 1 stack for each [[assist]], up to a '''maximum''' of 10 stacks
For every stack, gain {{as 4 ability power}}, up to {{as 40 AP}} at '''maximum''' stacks

simpleDescription: Provides Ability Power and Mana.  Increases in power as you kill enemies.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Glory stacks are preserved when upgrading to Mejai's Soulstealer.
Execution-semantics review: Glory stacks are event-gated (kills/assists/death) and apply AP through the stack state, not through direct damage events.
Map-specific balancing differences exist on rotating modes; this file keeps baseline SR-facing stack values and preserves Mejai upgrade stack carryover behavior.
